# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  age: number;
  role: string;
  department: string;
  status: string;
  createdAt: number;
}

interface Product {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  category: string;
  price: number;
  stock: number;
  brand: string;
  status: string;
}

async function createUser(user: User) {
  const key = ["users", user.id];
  await kv.set(key, user);
  
  await kv.set(["users_by_email", user.email], user.id);
  await kv.set(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id], user.id);
  await kv.set(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id], user.id);
  await kv.set(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id], user.id);
  
  return user;
}

async function createProduct(product: Product) {
  const key = ["products", product.id];
  await kv.set(key, product);
  
  await kv.set(["products_by_category", product.category, product.id], product.id);
  await kv.set(["products_by_brand", product.brand, product.id], product.id);
  await kv.set(["products_by_status", product.status, product.id], product.id);
  
  return product;
}

async function searchUsers(filters: Record<string, string>) {
  const results: User[] = [];
  
  if (filters.id) {
    const entry = await kv.get<User>(["users", filters.id]);
    if (entry.value) {
      results.push(entry.value);
    }
    return results;
  }
  
  if (filters.email) {
    const entry = await kv.get<string>(["users_by_email", filters.email]);
    if (entry.value) {
      const userEntry = await kv.get<User>(["users", entry.value]);
      if (userEntry.value) {
        results.push(userEntry.value);
      }
    }
    return results;
  }
  
  let prefix: Deno.KvKey;
  
  if (filters.role) {
    prefix = ["users_by_role", filters.role];
  } else if (filters.department) {
    prefix = ["users_by_department", filters.department];
  } else if (filters.status) {
    prefix = ["users_by_status", filters.status];
  } else {
    prefix = ["users"];
  }
  
  const iter = kv.list<User | string>({ prefix });
  
  for await (const entry of iter) {
    let user: User | null = null;
    
    if (typeof entry.value === "string") {
      const userEntry = await kv.get<User>(["users", entry.value]);
      user = userEntry.value;
    } else if (entry.key[0] === "users" && entry.key.length === 2) {
      user = entry.value as User;
    }
    
    if (user) {
      let match = true;
      
      if (filters.name && !user.name.toLowerCase().includes(filters.name.toLowerCase())) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.minAge && user.age < parseInt(filters.minAge)) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.maxAge && user.age > parseInt(filters.maxAge)) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.role && user.role !== filters.role) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.department && user.department !== filters.department) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.status && user.status !== filters.status) {
        match = false;
      }
      
      if (match) {
        results.push(user);
      }
    }
  }
  
  return results;
}

async function searchProducts(filters: Record<string, string>) {
  const results: Product[] = [];
  
  if (filters.id) {
    const entry = await kv.get<Product>(["products", filters.id]);
    if (entry.value) {
      results.push(entry.value);
    }
    return results;
  }
  
  let prefix: Deno.KvKey;
  
  if (filters.category) {
    prefix = ["products_by_category", filters.category];
  } else if (filters.brand) {
    prefix = ["products_by_brand", filters.brand];
  } else if (filters.status) {
    prefix = ["products_by_status", filters.status];
  } else {
    prefix = ["products"];
  }
  
  const iter = kv.list<Product | string>({ prefix });
  
  for await (const entry of iter) {
    let product: Product | null = null;
    
    if (typeof entry.value === "string") {
      const productEntry = await kv.get<Product>(["products", entry.value]);
      product = productEntry.value;
    } else if (entry.key[0] === "products" && entry.key.length === 2) {
      product = entry.value as Product;
    }
    
    if (product) {
      let match = true;
      
      if (filters.name && !product.name.toLowerCase().includes(filters.name.toLowerCase())) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.minPrice && product.price < parseFloat(filters.minPrice)) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.maxPrice && product.price > parseFloat(filters.maxPrice)) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.minStock && product.stock < parseInt(filters.minStock)) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.category && product.category !== filters.category) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.brand && product.brand !== filters.brand) {
        match = false;
      }
      if (filters.status && product.status !== filters.status) {
        match = false;
      }
      
      if (match) {
        results.push(product);
      }
    }
  }
  
  return results;
}

async function deleteUser(userId: string) {
  const userEntry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
  if (!userEntry.value) {
    return false;
  }
  
  const user = userEntry.value;
  
  await kv.delete(["users", userId]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_email", user.email]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_role", user.role, userId]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_department", user.department, userId]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_status", user.status, userId]);
  
  return true;
}

async function deleteProduct(productId: string) {
  const productEntry = await kv.get<Product>(["products", productId]);
  if (!productEntry.value) {
    return false;
  }
  
  const product = productEntry.value;
  
  await kv.delete(["products", productId]);
  await kv.delete(["products_by_category", product.category, productId]);
  await kv.delete(["products_by_brand", product.brand, productId]);
  await kv.delete(["products_by_status", product.status, productId]);
  
  return true;
}

async function updateUser(userId: string, updates: Partial<User>) {
  const userEntry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
  if (!userEntry.value) {
    return null;
  }
  
  const oldUser = userEntry.value;
  const newUser = { ...oldUser, ...updates, id: userId };
  
  await kv.delete(["users_by_email", oldUser.email]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_role", oldUser.role, userId]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_department", oldUser.department, userId]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_status", oldUser.status, userId]);
  
  await kv.set(["users", userId], newUser);
  await kv.set(["users_by_email", newUser.email], userId);
  await kv.set(["users_by_role", newUser.role, userId], userId);
  await kv.set(["users_by_department", newUser.department, userId], userId);
  await kv.set(["users_by_status", newUser.status, userId], userId);
  
  return newUser;
}

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;
  
  const corsHeaders = {
    "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
    "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
    "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
  };
  
  if (method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, { headers: corsHeaders });
  }
  
  try {
    if (path === "/users" && method === "POST") {
      const user = await req.json() as User;
      if (!user.id) {
        user.id = crypto.randomUUID();
      }
      user.createdAt = Date.now();
      const created = await createUser(user);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(created), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }
    
    if (path === "/users" && method === "GET") {
      const filters: Record<string, string> = {};
      url.searchParams.forEach((value, key) => {
        filters[key] = value;
      });
      
      const users = await searchUsers(filters);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(users), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }
    
    if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "GET") {
      const userId = path.split("/")[2];
      const entry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
      
      if (!entry.value) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: corsHeaders,
        });
      }
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(entry.value), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }
    
    if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "PUT") {
      const userId = path.split("/")[2];
      const updates = await req.json() as Partial<User>;
      const updated = await updateUser(userId, updates);
      
      if (!updated) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: corsHeaders,
        });
      }
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(updated), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }
    
    if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "DELETE") {
      const userId = path.split("/")[2];
      const deleted = await deleteUser(userId);
      
      if (!deleted) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: corsHeaders,
        });
      }
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true }), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }
    
    if (path === "/products" && method === "POST") {
      const product = await req.json() as Product;
      if (!product.id) {
        product.id = crypto.randomUUID();
      }
      const created = await createProduct(product);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(created), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }
    
    if (path === "/products" && method === "GET") {
      const filters: Record<string, string> = {};
      url.searchParams.forEach((value, key) => {
        filters[key] = value;
      });
      
      const products = await searchProducts(filters);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(products), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }
    
    if (path.startsWith("/products/") && method === "GET") {
      const productId = path.split("/")[2];
      const entry = await kv.get<Product>(["products", productId]);
      
      if (!entry.value) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Product not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: corsHeaders,
        });
      }
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(entry.value), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }
    
    if (path.startsWith("/products/") && method === "DELETE") {
      const productId = path.split("/")[2];
      const deleted = await deleteProduct(productId);
      
      if (!deleted) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Product not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: corsHeaders,
        });
      }
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true }), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }
    
    if (path === "/search" && method === "GET") {
      const entity = url.searchParams.get("entity");
      const filters: Record<string, string> = {};
      url.searchParams.forEach((value, key) => {
        if (key !== "entity") {
          filters[key] = value;
        }
      });
      
      let results;
      if (entity === "users") {
        results = await searchUsers(filters);
      } else if (entity === "products") {
        results = await searchProducts(filters);
      } else {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid entity type" }), {
          status: 400,
          headers: corsHeaders,
        });
      }
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(results), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }
    
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: corsHeaders,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
      status: 500,
      headers: corsHeaders,
    });
  }
}

serve(handler);
